content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年06月01日 周一
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus](https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus)
   Self-hosted AI workspace. | ⭐7379
2. [2aronS/Duel-Agents](https://github.com/2aronS/Duel-Agents)
   CLI, SDK, and IDE plugins for Duel Agents | ⭐572
3. [anthropic-claude-code-ai/free-claude-code-ai-desktop-app](https://github.com/anthropic-claude-code-ai/free-claude-code-ai-desktop-app)
   claude code ai free desktop app  api cli open source opencode aider gemini alter | ⭐318
4. [PolyMomentum-Labs/.github](https://github.com/PolyMomentum-Labs/.github)
   Official docs for PolyMomentum — Polymarket CLOB V2 integration, trading strateg | ⭐287
5. [jdevalk/specification.website](https://github.com/jdevalk/specification.website)
   Website specification — HTML, accessibility, security, SEO, agent-readiness. Pla | ⭐261
6. [polymaxi2/polymarket-arbitrage-trading-bot](https://github.com/polymaxi2/polymarket-arbitrage-trading-bot)
   polymarket trading bot polymarket bot polymarket bot polymarket bot polymarket t | ⭐258
7. [liyue-aigc/female-portrait-director](https://github.com/liyue-aigc/female-portrait-director)
   A modular Codex Skill for directing and expanding detailed AI female portrait pr | ⭐227
8. [DannyMac180/skills](https://github.com/DannyMac180/skills)
   AI agent skills created by me: Dan McAteer | ⭐213

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
